MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Scott Erwin Bassin, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Edward Ong, who is also present. Michael Dell, Esq., limited scope attorney for defendants Eric Thorsen & Stacy Dodd, who are also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment for property located at 1455 Clay Street, Apt. 9, San Francisco, California, filed. See scanned document. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, Clerk Garth Sayers, Not Reported
